// What We Can Automate

Business Automation Built Around Your Industry

// How It Works

Simple flow. Smart system. Clear result.

From the moment a visitor lands on your page to the moment you follow up — every step is organized, automated, and trackable.

01
🌐
Client Visits Your Page

A visitor lands on your branded landing page — clean, fast, and designed to guide them toward the next step.

02
💬
CTA or Chatbot Opens

The visitor clicks a CTA button or the AI chatbot opens automatically, welcoming them with a guided message.

03
🧠
Guided Questions Asked

The chatbot or form asks simple, friendly questions to understand what the client needs and their contact details.

04
📥
Lead Data is Captured

All inquiry details — name, business, need, and contact — are captured automatically into a structured record.

05
📊
Data Goes to CRM / Sheet

Captured leads are automatically organized into your CRM dashboard or Google Sheet backend — sorted, labeled, and ready for review.

06
🚀
You Follow Up Faster

You open your dashboard and see organized leads. No more scattered messages or missed inquiries — just clean, ready-to-act records.

07
⚙️
Manual Work Reduced

Notifications, follow-up reminders, and routing happen automatically — so you spend less time on admin and more time running your business.

What's Inside the System
🌐
Branded Landing Page
A clean, mobile-ready page designed for your business — built to capture attention and guide visitors toward action.
🤖
AI Chatbot Funnel
A guided chatbot that welcomes visitors, asks the right questions, and collects their details — even while you're offline.
📊
CRM Dashboard + Google Sheet
Every inquiry is automatically organized into a clean CRM record — name, business, need, contact, and timestamp — ready for follow-up.
⚙️
Backend Automation Logic
Lead routing, notification triggers, and follow-up flows — so your inquiry pipeline moves on its own without manual sorting.
🚀
Demo + Walkthrough Session
We walk you through the live system, fine-tune the CTA flow, and make sure everything is working before handoff.
